creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # service netdata stop
Stopping netdata.
Waiting for PIDS: 7309 7311.
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # pkg upgrade -f -r poudriere net-mgmt/netdata

Starting netdata.

root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # 


Logged errors aside, the web server is responsive and <localhost:19999/#menu_zfs_submenu_size;after=-864000;before=0> appears correct. 

----

Re: the originally reported symptoms, 

> net-mgmt/netdata: sometimes not running when expected, 
> sometimes running but http://localhost:19999 not responding

– I lean towards closing this report as overcome by events … whilst I don't recall find those symptoms in recent days, I might have (more easily) observed netdata-related processes sometimes not stopping when they should at shutdown or reboot time. I'll keep my eyes open for this.
